HGSS.549.0000:
When you first catch a Pokémon,
it may be weak.\f
But it will eventually grow to
be strong.\f
It’s important to treat Pokémon
with love.
HGSS.549.0001:
Pokémon can hold items like a Potion
or an Antidote.\f
But they don’t appear to know how
to use man-made items.
HGSS.549.0002:
Long time no see, [0103,0000,0000].
I’ve been waiting for you.\r
This is from Professor Elm.\f
The thing is...we would like you to
take care of an Egg! [0200,0000]
HGSS.549.0003:
Long time no see, [0103,0000,0000].
I’ve been waiting for you.\r
This is from Professor Elm.\f
The thing is...we would like you to
take care of an Egg! [0200,0000]
HGSS.549.0004:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Egg from the assistant!
HGSS.549.0005:
After you left, Professor Elm received
a phone call. I have no idea what they\r
were talking about.\f
But, after a while, Professor Elm
suddenly cried out, “I can’t think of\r
anyone more suited than [0103,0000,0000]!”\f
Then he insisted that I hand this Egg
to you.\f
That’s how I came here to deliver the
Egg to you.\f
It seems that a Pokémon will hatch from
it only when you keep it in your party\r
of Pokémon.\f
That’s another reason we’ve
chosen you, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Please take care of it!\f
HGSS.549.0006:
After you left, Professor Elm received
a phone call. I have no idea what they\r
were talking about, but after a while,\r
Professor Elm suddenly cried out,\r
“I can’t think of anyone more suited\r
for that than [0103,0000,0000]!”\f
Then he insisted that I hand this Egg
to you.\f
That’s how I came here to deliver the
Egg to you.\f
It seems that a Pokémon will hatch from
it only when you keep it in your party\r
of Pokémon.\f
That’s another reason we’ve
chosen you, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Please take care of it!\f
HGSS.549.0007:
Your party is full.
You cannot take the Egg yet.\r
I’ll wait here for you.
HGSS.549.0008:
What?
I never expected you’d say no!\r
You must be kidding, right?\f
Professor Elm really wants you to
take care of it...
